title: Excalibur | Farmer's Delight Support
description: A retexture of the mod, Farmer's Delight. Adapted and made to run alongside the Excalibur resource pack by Maffhew.
body:
![Farmer's Delight Excalibur Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d9f235a53f95caef12c67110012e93f1bf37871.png)

A **resource pack** designed to align the aesthetics of [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) mod with the [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack. This pack is considered 100% completed, containing 411 textures for various items and blocks.

## Installation: 
> Launch Minecraft and click on "Options"

> Click on "Resource Packs"

> Click on "Open Resource Pack Folder"

> Drag the FarmersDelightExcaliburSupport.zip file into the resource pack folder
  
> Move the Farmer's Delight Excalibur Support resource pack from the left column to the right

> Make sure that the support pack is placed above the original Excalibur resource pack

> Select "Done" 

> GET FARMING
